EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} modified the Pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is viewing information about Pod templates on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to view information about Pod templates on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} deleted Pod templates on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} created the Pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to modify a Pod template on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} viewed information about the Pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} viewed information about Pod templates on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is deleting the Pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is viewing information about the Pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to view information about the Pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} failed to delete the Pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} failed to delete Pod templates on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} is modifying the Pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} deleted the Pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is deleting Pod templates on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is creating the Pod template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to create a Pod template on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
